ACORD 25 (2016/03)                                              CERTIFICATE OF LIABILITY INSURANCE

THIS CERTIFICATE IS ISSUED AS A MATTER OF INFORMATION ONLY. THIS CERTIFICATE DOES NOT CONSTITUTE A CONTRACT BETWEEN THE ISSUING INSURER(S), AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE OR PRODUCER, AND THE CERTIFICATE HOLDER.

DATE ISSUED: 01/08/2025

-----------------------------------------------------------------
PRODUCER
Riverside Commercial Insurance Group
220 Riverside Drive, Suite 400
Newark, NJ 07102
Phone: (973) 555-0166
Email: certs@riversidecommercial.com
-----------------------------------------------------------------
INSURED
Apex Building Services Corp.
1100 Commerce Way
Elizabeth, NJ 07206
-----------------------------------------------------------------
INSURERS AFFORDING COVERAGE
  INSURER A: The Travelers Indemnity Company     NAIC# 25658
-----------------------------------------------------------------

COVERAGES                                                   CERTIFICATE NUMBER: 2025-0108-APEX

+---+---------------------------+------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+
| # | TYPE OF INSURANCE         | POLICY NUMBER    | EFF DATE    | EXP DATE    | LIMITS                    |
+---+---------------------------+------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+
| A | COMMERCIAL GENERAL LIAB   | TRV-GL-2025-1122 | 01/01/2025  | 01/01/2026  | Each Occurrence $2,000,000|
|   | [X] Occurrence            |                  |             |             | Gen Aggregate  $4,000,000 |
|   |                           |                  |             |             | Prods-Comp Ops $4,000,000 |
+---+---------------------------+------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+
| A | AUTOMOBILE LIABILITY      | TRV-CA-2025-1122 | 01/01/2025  | 01/01/2026  | Combined Single Limit     |
|   | [X] Any Auto              |                  |             |             |                 $1,000,000|
+---+---------------------------+------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+
| A | UMBRELLA LIAB  [X] Occur  | TRV-UM-2025-7788 | 01/01/2025  | 01/01/2026  | Each Occurrence $10,000,000|
|   |                           |                  |             |             | Aggregate       $10,000,000|
+---+---------------------------+------------------+-------------+-------------+---------------------------+

DESCRIPTION OF OPERATIONS / LOCATIONS / VEHICLES (ACORD 101):
Facility maintenance, janitorial, and grounds-keeping services performed at Metro Development Partners properties. Certificate holder named as additional insured on GL and umbrella on a primary and non-contributory basis.

-----------------------------------------------------------------
CERTIFICATE HOLDER
Metro Development Partners
250 West Broad Street, Floor 11
Newark, NJ 07102
-----------------------------------------------------------------

AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE:
   ~ Riverside Commercial Insurance Group, agent for Travelers ~
   certs@riversidecommercial.com

CANCELLATION:
Should any of the above-described policies be cancelled before the expiration date thereof, notice will be delivered in accordance with the policy provisions. Except 10 days notice for non-payment.

Page 1 of 2

----- ATTACHMENT: ADDITIONAL INSURED ENDORSEMENT FORM CG 20 10 -----

Endorsement Number: 001
Effective: 01/01/2025
Attaches to policy: TRV-GL-2025-1122

WHO IS AN INSURED is amended to include as an additional insured the person(s) or organization(s) shown in the Schedule, but only with respect to liability for 'bodily injury', 'property damage' or 'personal and advertising injury' caused, in whole or in part, by:
   1. Your acts or omissions; or
   2. The acts or omissions of those acting on your behalf;
in the performance of your ongoing operations for the additional insured(s) at the location(s) designated above.

Schedule: Metro Development Partners and its subsidiaries as required by written contract.
